mechanics.excerpt: Some pieces of technology such as the myomer implantation device ad the gauss rifle , could longer be produced Humans coined new word lostech ~to describe these lost technologies_ During the dark ages of the Succession Wars_ the quality of life declined to low not seen centuries_ Many remote worlds were reduced to subsistence farming; with no technology more advanced than beast pulling metal plow: Some colonies sim ply vanished The men and women who could have nelped t0 pull the Inner Sphere out of these desperate times were instead kept busy building the machines destruction that had caused CATCH-UP From Our Century; Part IV; Kana Sohiri, Digest of Our Times; Tharkad Press, 3060 first, many generals believed the Clans were invading aliens from some unknown planet deep the galactic core Many people have since ridiculed that error but given the evidence available to them; the mistake was understandable_ The Clans possessed technology far superior anything armies had ever fielded, and they used completely foreign tac tics_ Elementals battle armor, which ooked t0 us Iike some kind of mythica monsters further convinced many that the Clans were not human When finally found out that were fighting fellow humans the discussions turned from What are they?
